title: The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog

sources.title: The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog (1927)
sources.description: "The Lodger" is a silent horror-thriller film directed by Alfred Hitchcock, based on the novel by Marie Belloc Lowndes. Set in London, the story revolves around a mysterious lodger who rents a room from a couple, Mr. and Mrs. Bunting, in their home. Set against the backdrop of London during the infamous Jack the Ripper murders, the story follows a couple, Mr. and Mrs. Bunting , who take in a mysterious lodger into their home. As the Buntings become increasingly suspicious of their tenant’s peculiar habits and secretive behavior, they grapple with the fear that he might be connected to the gruesome crimes plaguing the city.

sources.title: Alfred Hichcock | The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog (1927) [Silent Movie]
sources.description:
"The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog" is a silent film directed by Alfred Hitchcock in 1926 and released on 14 February 1927 in London and on 10 June 1928 in New York City. The film, based on a story by Marie Belloc Lowndes and a play Who Is He? co-written by Belloc Lowndes, concerns the hunt for a "Jack the Ripper" type of serial killer in London. The wrong man is accused of the crime and is forced to try to prove his innocence.

---

Directed by Alfred Hitchcock, produced by Michael Balcon and Carlyle Blackwell, written by Marie Belloc Lowndes (novel) and Eliot Stannard, starring Marie Ault, Arthur Chesney, June, Malcolm Keen and Ivor Novello.

---

Source: "The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog" Wikipedia, The Free Encyclopedia. Wikimedia Foundation, Inc.. 24 June 2012. Web. 9 July 2012. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Lodger:_A_Story_of_the_London_Fog.

metadata.Plot: A serial killer known as "The Avenger" is on the loose in London, murdering blonde women. A mysterious man arrives at the house of Mr. and Mrs. Bunting looking for a room to rent. The Bunting's daughter is a blonde model and is seeing one of the detectives assigned to the case. The detective becomes jealous of the lodger and begins to suspect he may be the avenger.
metadata.Writer: Marie Belloc Lowndes, Eliot Stannard, Alfred Hitchcock
metadata.Actors: June Tripp, Ivor Novello, Marie Ault
